message:
fix(storage,fsfs,fusion): fix backpressure gating for delayed retries, mount path boundary matching, and code formatting

crates/frankensearch-storage/src/job_queue.rs:
- Fix is_backpressured() to use ready_pending instead of pending count,
  preventing false QueueFull errors when queue has delayed-retry jobs
  but zero ready jobs — previously, delayed retries counted toward the
  backpressure threshold even though they aren't immediately runnable
- Rename and update tests to clarify backpressure semantics
- Add regression test for delayed-retry backpressure behavior

crates/frankensearch-storage/src/pipeline.rs:
- Update backpressure check in StorageBackedJobRunner::ingest() to
  use ready_pending consistently with job_queue fix
- Add regression test ingest_allows_new_docs_when_only_delayed_pending_jobs_exist

crates/frankensearch-fsfs/src/mount_info.rs:
- Fix mount path matching: change path.starts_with(mp) to
  path.strip_prefix(mp).is_ok() to respect path boundaries
  (e.g., /mnt/nfs-shared should not match mount point /mnt/nfs)
- Add regression test mount_table_lookup_respects_path_boundaries

crates/frankensearch-fsfs/src/runtime.rs:
- Format cleanup: fix line breaks in batch indexing pipeline for
  readability, remove excess blank line

crates/frankensearch-fusion/src/searcher.rs:
- Update skip reason from "no_fast_phase_candidates" to
  "vector_index_unavailable" in search diagnostic test

crates/frankensearch-index/src/lib.rs:
- Reformat WAL stale-detection test code for line length compliance

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Close bd-30d2.25 (backpressure gating fix using ready_pending)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
